articles.title: 1,500 Beagles Freed from Wisconsin Research Facility in Historic Rescue
articles.summary: In a confidential deal, 1,500 beagles were purchased from Ridglan Farms, a breeding facility that faced protests and animal mistreatment allegations. The first 300 dogs left on Friday, heading to rescues nationwide. Over 700 adoption applications have poured in.

articles.title: Pain at the Pump: Gas Prices Surge Over 30 Cents in a Week as Strait of Hormuz Remains Blocked
articles.summary: U.S. gas prices hit $4.446 per gallon—a 30-cent spike in one week—as the Iran war keeps the Strait of Hormuz closed. Experts warn prices could climb for months, with no quick relief even if the conflict ends. The strategic oil reserve release hasn't tamed the surge.

articles.title: Teen Sensation Kimi Antonelli Wins Miami GP, Extends F1 Championship Lead with Historic Feat
articles.summary: At 19, Kimi Antonelli became the first F1 driver to convert his first three pole positions into victories, winning the Miami Grand Prix by 3.2 seconds over Lando Norris. The Italian now leads the championship by 20 points after four rounds—all won by Mercedes.
